_instructions: EXAMPLE profile. Run `python3 start.py` and it walks you through building your own profile.json (using these as the defaults). Or copy this file to profile.json and edit by hand. risk_tolerance = conservative | moderate | aggressive. asset_classes = any of: stocks, crypto, options. watchlist = the only tickers the agent may trade. capital = starting USD.
name: Austin's book
notes: Single-name momentum on conviction names; aggressive convex options expression. I don't want to be fully invested all the time — lean in hard when opportunity is rich, sit small when it isn't.
